title: monday + docusign

posts.author: noasegal (Noa Segal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone managed to get the docusign webform to upate items (contacts) in monday upon web form submission/envelope completion?

I’m doing this manually but it’s a time consuming task.

I have a web plan which means docusign will not offer support on their very own in house built integration.
